title: Add post-RRF reranking with importance and recency boosting

acceptanceCriteria.text: Post-RRF reranking step added to search pipeline
Reranking formula boosts by importance (1-10 scale) and recency (decay factor)
Test: importance=9 chunk outranks importance=2 chunk when RRF scores are equal
Test: recent chunk (today) outranks old chunk (6 months ago) when RRF scores are equal
Test: reranking doesn't break existing search result ordering for normal queries
Run CodeRabbit review - must pass (or create BUG if unfixable)
Commit: feat: US-002 add post-RRF importance and recency reranking
